title: alsine littoralis
intro: Alsine littoralis, also known as sea campion, is a flowering plant that belongs to the pink family and is found in coastal areas of Europe, particularly in the UK. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Alsine littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Alsine littoralis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
